name: source-first-clone
description: Prefer original embeds, previews, viewers, and remixable sources before rebuilding a reference surface.

interface.shortDescription: Find reuse paths, attach session-aware capture, and avoid fake-exact rebuilds
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for source-first webpage intake. It inspects URLs, discovers embed and preview candidates, classifies when exact reuse is possible, adds session-aware runtime capture scaffolds with Playwright-style options, and only falls back to rebuilding after the source-first paths are exhausted.
defaultPrompt: Use the original embed or preview URL before recreating this reference.
If the original page itself is frameable, use direct iframe reuse instead of rebuilding it.
Inspect this link and tell me whether it should be embedded, sourced, or rebuilt.
Run the full clone_reference_url workflow for this link, attach session-aware capture if needed, and plan the exact clone path for this page.
